page_metadata.biotools__summary: FinaleDB (FragmentatIoN AnaLysis of cEll-free DNA DataBase) is a comprehensive cell-free DNA (cfDNA) fragmentation pattern database to host uniformly processed and quality controlled paired-end cfDNA WGS datasets.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FinaleDB (FragmentatIoN AnaLysis of cEll-free DNA DataBase) is a comprehensive cell-free DNA (cfDNA) fragmentation pattern database to host uniformly processed and quality controlled paired-end cfDNA WGS datasets.
